display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: New York Knicks 2026 Championship Parade
programme.desc: Fans celebrate the New York Knicks' first NBA Championship in 53 years with a ticker-tape parade through the city's "Canyon of Heroes.".

programme.title: Best of the Knicks
programme.desc: From March 13, 2026.

programme.title: Best of the Knicks
programme.desc: From March 17, 2026.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance features top-ranked fighters, up-and-coming fighters, intense action and footage from some of the biggest names in combat sports and exclusive content spanning MMA, boxing, kickboxing, bare knuckle boxing, Muay Thai and more.

programme.title: Live: Tennis
programme.desc: Coverage from the world of tennis.

programme.desc: Featuring interviews and images of American sports figures.

programme.title: Best of the Knicks
programme.desc: From March 13, 2026.

programme.title: Tennis

programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Rangers Classics
programme.desc: Game 3 of the Eastern Conference Quarterfinals. From April 17, 2007.

programme.title: T100 Triathlon World Tour Highlights
programme.desc: Extended highlights of the men's race at the 2026 Sokin T100 San Francisco, a race on the weekend of the Sokin Escape From Alcatraz triathlon.

programme.title: Road Trip Angler
programme.desc: Jameson Redding hits the road to find the best fishing spots in America.

programme.title: Rangers Classics
programme.desc: From April 18, 2007.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Boxing
programme.desc: Replays of classic boxing matches.

programme.title: Live: Tennis
programme.desc: Coverage from the world of tennis.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Red Wings reach the third stop in a six-game trip when they face the Canucks. Detroit triumphed 3-2 over Vancouver in overtime during its last trip to Rogers Arena on Feb. 2. Alex DeBrincat scored two goals for the Wings, including the winner.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Lukas Dostal 40 Saves: From Ball Arena. From Jan.21, 2026.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Justus Annunen 43 Saves: From Honda Center. From April 7, 2026.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Ilya Sorokin. From Jan. 6, 2026. From UBS Arena.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Ilya Sorokin. From Jan. 6, 2026. From UBS Arena.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the First Round in the playoff series between the Los Angeles Kings and the Colorado Avalanche begins at Ball Arena. Colorado dominated the regular-season series 3-0 and enters the playoffs with home-ice advantage as the NHL's top seed.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Kings face the Avalanche in Game 2 of the West first round at Ball Arena. Colorado leads 1-0 after a 2-1 win April 19. Scott Wedgewood made 24 saves in his first career playoff start while Artemi Panarin provided the lone goal for Los Angeles.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche and Kings meet for Game 3 of the West first round at Crypto.com Arena. Colorado leads the series 2-0 after a 2-1 win where Nicolas Roy's OT goal erased a lead set by Artemi Panarin. Scott Wedgewood made 24 saves in the victory.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Avalanche face the Kings at Crypto.com Arena for Game 4. Colorado leads 3-0 after a 4-2 Game 3 win. Cale Makar scored the tiebreaker, and Brock Nelson sealed the victory with an empty-net goal. Moore and Kempe provided the scoring for the Kings.

programme.title: Hawkeytown: Portland to the Pros
programme.desc: The story of players achieving their dream of playing in the NHL.

programme.title: Top Shelf
programme.desc: Great plays don't discriminate but with so many games, it's nearly impossible to catch them all. This show fills in the gaps and keeps fans abreast of the latest eye-popping moves, tricks and stops.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from a penny to millions.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Brooke Burns and Mark Labbett reunite in a showdown.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Antoinette, Julian, Danielle and Christine.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Siblings Weston and Taylor vs. married couple Marcus and Rashena.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Brandon "The Lightning Bolt" Blackwell returns as the featured Chaser as he faces off in a trivia battle against a personal stylist, a software consultant, an executive coach and a diversity and inclusion leader.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Boston; Oakland, Calif. and Washington, Mo. compete.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Friends battle! Gerry and Brie are up against Sharon and Radka.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Nicola, Jack, Rachel, and Kimberly.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.title: POOF! Bye Bye Under Eye Bags!
programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Mark Duplass, Yvette Nicole Brown, Larry Wilmore and Tisha Campbell.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from a penny to millions.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Bethany, Jarron, John and Megan.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Funny guys Kashmir and Derrick battle it out with sisters-in-law Ronda and Sherita.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Victoria Groce returns as the featured chaser when she goes head-to-head in a trivia battle against an emergency room doctor, a fashion blogger and a data analyst.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox host the Boston Red Sox at Rate Field to open their three-game series. Chicago relies on left-handed pitcher Noah Schultz to take the mound, while the Red Sox counter with Willson Contreras who leads with home runs and RBIs.

programme.title: The Big Pro Football Show
programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox host the Boston Red Sox at Rate Field to open their three-game series. Chicago relies on left-handed pitcher Noah Schultz to take the mound, while the Red Sox counter with Willson Contreras who leads with home runs and RBIs.

programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.title: Minor League Baseball
programme.desc: From Truist Field in Charlotte, N.C.

programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.desc: Better Bladder is a new safe and natural alternative to drugs, surgery and adult diapers. 90 percent see fewer bathroom visits, leaks & accidents. Tune in for a special TV offer!

programme.title: B1G Trailblazers
programme.desc: Businesswoman, co-founder of BET, governor of the WNBA's Washington Mystics and University of Illinois graduate, Sheila Johnson discusses her path to becoming the first billionaire African-American woman and the legacy she wants to leave behind.

programme.title: Live: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: University Showcase
programme.desc: Learn about the history of agriculture at the University of Illinois along with recent discoveries that have not only helped to feed students on campus, but people around the world.

programme.title: Illinois Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Keaton Wagner scored 28 points in the 9th-ranked Fighting Illini's 78-69 victory over the 5th-ranked Cornhuskers. From Feb. 1, 2026.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Illinois Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Keaton Wagler scored a career-high 46 points to help lead the 11th-ranked Fighting Illini to an 88-82 victory over the 4th-ranked Boilermakers. From Jan. 24, 2026.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: Luke Altmeyer passed for a touchdown and ran in another score to help the 22nd-ranked Fighting Illini beat the 24th-ranked Wolverines, 21-7. From Oct. 19, 2024.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: David Olano kicked a 41-yard field goal as time expired to lift the 23rd-ranked Fighting Illini to a 34-32 victory over the 21st-ranked Trojans. From Sept. 27, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Illinois Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: From Oct. 8, 2011.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: David Reisner kicks a game-winning 36-yard field goal with 8 seconds left to give Illinois a 16-14 victory over Penn State. From Nov. 22, 2014.

programme.title: Illinois Football Classic
programme.desc: The Fighting Illini defense sack Brock Osweiler six times and turn one into a touchdown to upset the 22nd-ranked Sun Devils in a 17-14 win. From Sept. 17, 2011.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: Dave Revsine breaks down the biggest stories of the day from around the Big Ten. Hear from B1G analysts, coaches, players and more as they discuss a range of sports topics.

programme.title: College Golf
programme.desc: Coverage of college golf action.

programme.title: B1G Plus Encore
programme.desc: From Jan. 9, 2025.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: A look back at the moments that led up to the last second Nick Anderson shot that sealed the Fighting Illini a big win over the Hoosiers in 1989.

programme.title: Men's College Wrestling
programme.desc: From Huff Hall in Champaign, Ill.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: Baseball action.

programme.title: Purdue Football Classic
programme.desc: From Nov. 12, 2011.

programme.title: Big Ten Elite
programme.desc: The 2000 Boilermakers, led by Head Coach Joe Tiller and QB Drew Brees, returned to the Rose Bowl after winning the Big Ten title for the first time since 1966. Tiller, Brees and others discuss their wins over Michigan, Wisconsin and Ohio State.

programme.title: Purdue Football Classic
programme.desc: Drew Brees throws for 286 yards to become Purdue's all-time passing leader and Travis Dorsch kicks a 33-yard field goal with four seconds remaining to complete the Boilermakers rally and upset the Wolverines 32-31. From Oct. 7, 2000.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Bowlin Stadium in Lincoln, Neb.

programme.title: Passion & Perseverance: 1999 Purdue Women's Basketball
programme.desc: The 1998-99 Purdue Boilermakers women's basketball team was the first Purdue basketball team to win a national championship. The team was undefeated in conference play and finished the regular season with one loss.

programme.title: Purdue Basketball Classic
programme.desc: From March 4, 2012.

programme.title: Purdue Basketball Classic
programme.desc: From March 10, 2013.

programme.title: Purdue Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: From Oct. 2, 2025.

programme.title: Purdue Volleyball Classic
programme.desc: Eva Hudson had a double-double with 30 kills and 11 digs to help the 16th-ranked Boilermakers upset the 3rd-ranked Badgers in five sets. From Nov. 17, 2023.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Basketball
programme.desc: See how Braden Smith has continued to grow as point guard for the Boilermakers, and Lance Jones has regained his joy in playing basketball again. Hear from National Player of the Year Zach Edey on his decision to return for his senior year.

programme.title: Purdue Basketball Classic
programme.desc: Oscar Cluff scored 21 points and Trey Kaufman-Renn had 20 to help the 7th-seeded Boilermakers beat the top-seeded Wolverines, 80-72, to earn the program's third Big Ten Tournament title. From March 15, 2026.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: We are Liverpool
programme.desc: The Republic of Ireland legend talks about his career playing around the globe and time wearing the famous No.7 jersey for the Reds.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In this LFC Originals exclusive, we visit the childhood home of Alisson Becker and discover the story of his first steps towards becoming one of the world¿s finest goalkeepers.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: We are in Rome for the second part of our exclusive documentary, learning how Alisson fought to establish himself in the Italian capital and in Jürgen Klopp¿s Liverpool plans.

programme.title: Alisson: My Story
programme.desc: In the final part of our story, we experience the incredible highs and devastating lows on and off the pitch as Alisson becomes a Reds legend and makes Liverpool his home.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2006/07 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: The story of Liverpool's most prolific Premier League goalscorer and the man nicknamed 'God' by the Kop.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Burnley.

programme.title: How The Cup Was Won
programme.desc: Relive Liverpool's glorious march to success in the 2011/12 Carling Cup.

programme.title: Premier League Rewind
programme.desc: Archive Premier League action from Gerard Houllier's time as manager. This hour features games against Coventry), Charlton (), Ipswich () and West Brom (.

programme.title: Salah: Farewell to The King
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary celebrating Mohamed Salah¿s extraordinary legacy at Liverpool.

programme.title: Ultimate XI
programme.desc: Former Liverpool forward Emile Heskey takes on the role of fantasy manager and reveals who would make it into his Ultimate XI.

programme.title: Retro Reds - The Golden Hour
programme.desc: Relive classic LFC action from the archives. This week we recall four First Division fixtures from the memorable 1987/88 season against Newcastle, Queens Park Rangers, Arsenal and Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: Macca & Macca
programme.desc: Steve McManaman discusses his match-winning performance in the 1995 League Cup Final with his opponent that day, Jason McAteer.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: All the action as Liverpool take on Atletico Madrid at Anfield.

programme.title: European Royalty: The Joy of Six
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary in which we relive Liverpool's sixth European Cup victory in Madrid - and the subsequent parade which brought the city to a standstill.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born & Red
programme.desc: Three men who helped nurture a 9-year-old Steven Gerrard into one of the world's finest players talk in-depth about his development.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Relive all the goals from Liverpool 2018/19 Champions League campaign.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: Enjoy a selection of memorable goals scored by Dominik Szoboszlai.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: One Week In May...
programme.desc: The Story Of A Unique Treble: A documentary about the unforgettable 2000/01 season when Gerard Houllier¿s team charged to three trophies and Champions League qualification for the first time.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans back in 2022.

programme.title: All the Goals
programme.desc: From two-yard tap-ins to unstoppable scorchers - and the odd no-look finish - sit back and enjoy all 111 of the samba star's goals in a Liverpool shirt.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: Liverpool¿s Greatest
programme.desc: The winner of our Liverpools Greatest poll is revealed. See who is crowned the Reds' best men's player of all time, after a huge vote with the views of fans, former players, journalists and more.

programme.title: Robbo: All the goals and assists
programme.desc: Enjoy a collection of goals and assists by Andy Robertson.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Robbo: My Liverpool
programme.desc: An exclusive LFC Original documentary paying tribute to Andy Robertson and his remarkable nine-year journey at Liverpool.

programme.title: Mo Salah: Record Breaker
programme.desc: Former LFC striker Neil Mellor and Opta data editor Michael Reid crunch the numbers on Mohamed Salah¿s incredible Liverpool career, which saw the Egyptian King rewrite the record books.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: The week's most popular videos and social media highlights from across the Club, its players and supporters.

programme.title: Rush Scored Four
programme.desc: An LFC Original mini-documentary that relives the unforgettable afternoon at Goodison in 1982 when Ian Rush inspired the Reds to a famous 5-0 derby victory.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: The Hockey Hub
programme.desc: Hockey talk from NESN announcers that begins with the Bruins and expands to cover the greater New England hockey scene.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox host the Boston Red Sox at Rate Field to open their three-game series. Chicago relies on left-handed pitcher Noah Schultz to take the mound, while the Red Sox counter with Willson Contreras who leads with home runs and RBIs.

programme.title: Live: Boston's Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Live: Batting Practice Has Entered the Chat
programme.desc: Live coverage of Red Sox batting practice prior to tonight's game.

programme.title: Live: Red Sox First Pitch
programme.desc: A preview of the upcoming game and news and analysis from industry insiders.

programme.title: Red Sox GameDay Live
programme.desc: The latest pregame news and commentary about the Red Sox, plus exclusive features and analysis with former players and writers.

programme.title: Live: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Rate Field in Chicago.

programme.title: Red Sox Extra Innings Live
programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players, and highlights from around the league.

programme.desc: A complete breakdown of the game, postgame reaction from the players and highlights from around the league.

programme.title: Red Sox Report
programme.desc: An inside look at the 2026 Red Sox Hall of Fame Ceremony, inducting Jon Lester, Johnny Damon, Mike Timlin, and Sherm Feller into the Red Sox Hall of Fame alongside Bill Mueller's Memorable Moment with his walk-off home run against the Yankees.

programme.title: Live: Minor League Baseball

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from a penny to millions.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Brooke Burns and Mark Labbett reunite in a showdown.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Antoinette, Julian, Danielle and Christine.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Siblings Weston and Taylor vs. married couple Marcus and Rashena.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Brandon "The Lightning Bolt" Blackwell returns as the featured Chaser as he faces off in a trivia battle against a personal stylist, a software consultant, an executive coach and a diversity and inclusion leader.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Teams of two everyday people battle trivia questions and a 40-foot wall for the chance to win millions of dollars. Part smarts, part luck and part guts, their victory is as unpredictable as the bounce of the ball.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Boston; Oakland, Calif. and Washington, Mo. compete.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Friends battle! Gerry and Brie are up against Sharon and Radka.

programme.title: Protect Your Family From Identity Theft
programme.desc: Every 5 seconds there's a victim of identity theft; LifeLock helps alert you, restore your identity, and reimburse lost funds—leading the way in protecting families every day.

programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Fairways of Life With Matt Adams
programme.desc: NY Times Best Selling Author and Golf Channel's Matt Adams brings you inside the ropes where you'll get all the headlines, exclusive interviews with all of golf's stars, equipment updates, instruction for your game and so much more.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: SIGN OFF
programme.desc: Sign off.

programme.title: Golf Today
programme.desc: Damon Hack, Anna Jackson and Eamon Lynch lead and shape the daily conversation throughout the golf world.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan using other popular sports to lower your golf scores.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan to add more distance with the driver.

programme.title: The Next Shot
programme.desc: GolfPass coach Nathalie Sheehan has put together a practice plan to start making consistent solid contact.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are back on the range teaching how to get off to a solid start this golf season; ball striking tips used by greats; Hall reveals how two empty sleeves of golf balls can improve ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach a variety of shots from the sand, including how to hit green-side bunker shots. Martin also shares fairway bunker tips he learned from Rory McIlroy, and Tom Watson shares his advice for dealing with plugged lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots needed for success in The Masters; Martin shares a driving tip he learned playing golf with Dustin Johnson and a distance drill used by Jack Nicklaus; a top college player gives a guest lesson.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: Golf
programme.desc: Classic golf highlights.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: PGA TOUR Champions Learning Center
programme.desc: Tips and tricks from the legends of the game.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Rounds
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy entered his name into the record books when he carded a one-under-par 71 to claim a two-shot victory over Sergio Garcia and Rickie Fowler at the 143rd Open Championship at Royal Liverpool.

programme.title: The Smylie Show
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner Smylie Kaufman shares golf insights and conversations with tour pros and celebs.

programme.title: Vanity Index Podcast
programme.desc: An offbeat look at the game of golf.

programme.title: Golf
programme.desc: Classic golf highlights.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Bunker Play
programme.desc: How to master the standard greenside bunker shot as well as uphill and downhill lies in the sand.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: Live: 2026 The Amundi Evian Championship
programme.desc: From Evian Resort Golf Club in Évian-les-Bains, Haute-Savoie, France.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Round 1 gets underway at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. Scottie Scheffler, Rory McIlroy and previous Scottish Open winner Chris Gotterup go up against the 7,237-yard course for a total prize pool of $9 million.

programme.title: Live: 2026 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: From Firestone Country Club South Course in Akron, Ohio.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The 2026 ISCO Championship Round 1 gets underway at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville. The tournament features a 144-player field with defending champion William Mouw. Amateur Miles Russell, 17, joins veterans Max Homa and Lucas Glover.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Golf Channel's flagship news program, the nightly "Golf Central" presents highlights from the major golf tours and world events, plus reports and features from tournament sites.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The 2026 Genesis Scottish Open Round 1 gets underway at The Renaissance Club in Scotland. Scottie Scheffler, Rory McIlroy and previous Scottish Open winner Chris Gotterup go up against the 7,237-yard course for a total prize pool of $9 million.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Cardinal host the Golden Bears. Stanford leads the all-time series 65-51-11, but California has won four straight meetings after rallying to keep the streak alive in 2024. Cal stunned then-No. 15 Louisville in overtime prior to its bye Nov. 8.

programme.title: College Baseball
programme.desc: From Klein Field at Sunken Diamond in Stanford, Calif.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Boyd and Jill Smith Family Stadium in Stanford, Calif.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: All the action from college football.

programme.title: Women's College Volleyball
programme.desc: From L&N Federal Credit Union Arena in Louisville, Ky.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Tar Heels travel to Stanford, CA, to face the Cardinal at Maples Pavilion for an ACC matchup. Forward Caleb Wilson leads North Carolina with 19.5 PPG and 11.0 RPG, while Stanford's guard Ebuka Okorie leads the team with 22.1 PPG and 2.9 APG.

programme.title: Women's College Soccer
programme.desc: From Cobb Stadium in Coral Gables, Fla.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From the Softball Stadium at Skytop in Syracuse, N.Y.

programme.title: Men's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: From JMA Dome in Syracuse, N.Y.

programme.title: Women's College Basketball
programme.desc: The Stanford Cardinal travel to the JMA Wireless Dome to face the Syracuse Orange. The Orange have been formidable at home this season with a 10-2 record. Nunu Agara has become the team's engine, leading the Orange in scoring 15.3 points per game.

programme.title: College Field Hockey
programme.desc: First Round.

programme.title: Men's College Soccer
programme.desc: Action from men's college soccer.

programme.title: College Basketball
programme.desc: The Volunteers hope to rebound by visiting the Orange for an SEC/ACC Challenge match. Tennessee was 2-1 at the Players Era Festival's in Las Vegas, taking its first loss of the season in the third-place match to Kansas, while Syracuse was 0-3.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Second Quarterfinal.

programme.title: 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament
programme.desc: The No. 8 Iowa State Cyclones play the No. 9 Syracuse Orange in the first round of the 2026 NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament. This Round of 64 matchup in the Fort Worth Regional 1 takes place at Gampel Pavilion in Storrs, Connecticut.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The Orange take on the Tigers. Syracuse quarterback Steve Angeli threw for 382 yards and five touchdowns during a 66-24 drubbing of Colgate on Sept. 12. Clemson slipped from the top 25 after a 24-21 setback at Georgia Tech to begin ACC play Sept. 13.
